{{Infobox character
| name = Chronicler (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Chronicler}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Witness' Guild|Witness’ Guild]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Chronicler}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Shadow and Sea (novel)|Of Shadow and Sea]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Chroniclers]] are specialized individuals who serve the Witnesses. Due to their inherent talents as [[Readers]], they possess the ability to uncover hidden information and secrets, such as the location of [[Nakothi]]’s [[Heart]]. During their tenure at the [[Imperial Palace]], they are positioned to gain significant insight into the workings of the [[Empire]]. To ensure their recollections remain perfect, [[Chroniclers]] utilize alchemically treated candles attached to their belts; by lighting these, they can experience their own memories with absolute accuracy.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Chroniclers]] are talented [[Readers]] by definition.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A spade embedded in the Chronicler's calf drops him to his knees.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Naberius]] is a Chronicler.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Chroniclers]] carry alchemically treated candles to store [[Intent]] for memory recollection.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Chronicler is a role performed by the Heads of the [[Witness]]’ [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Readers]]
